task: Create a JSON configuration file for an AWS Lambda function that processes S3 events, with environment variables for the bucket name and log level
solution_criteria: A valid JSON object containing Lambda function metadata, environment variables section with bucket name and log level, and event source mapping configuration for S3

task: Write a Python function that takes an AWS S3 bucket name and prefix as parameters and returns a list of all object keys in that bucket using boto3
solution_criteria: A function that uses boto3 S3 client, handles pagination correctly, filters by prefix, and returns a clean list of object keys without errors

task: Create an XML CloudFormation template that defines an AWS IAM role with permissions to read from an S3 bucket and write logs to CloudWatch
solution_criteria: Valid XML with proper CloudFormation syntax, IAM role definition, inline policy with S3 read permissions and CloudWatch Logs write permissions, and correct resource references

task: Write a regular expression that validates an AWS S3 bucket name according to AWS naming rules (3-63 characters, lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, must start and end with letter or number)
solution_criteria: A regex pattern that enforces length constraints (3-63 chars), allows only lowercase alphanumeric and hyphens, and ensures the name starts and ends with alphanumeric characters
